title: Protection Against Unauthorized Bank Transactions
summary: Customers are protected against unauthorized electronic banking transactions if reported promptly.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: If someone steals money from your bank account digitally, you may not be liable if you report it quickly.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Protects customers from financial loss due to cyber fraud.

exampleScenario.situation: Money is withdrawn from a customer's account through online fraud.
exampleScenario.explanation: Customer can report to bank and claim protection.

stepByStepAction: Block debit card or online banking
File complaint with RBI banking ombudsman if unresolved
